meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Accelerate Your Freelance Dev Workflow
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with slow development cycles. Master Claude Code skills setup with this expert-level checklist designed specifically for high-velocity freelancers.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, integrate Claude Code with Antigravity to automate boilerplate, context injection, and refactoring. By defining custom skill-sets within your Claude configuration, you transform a sluggish IDE environment into an autonomous coding engine, enabling you to deliver client features in hours rather than days.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the client deadline is looming, and your velocity feels like it’s stuck in low gear. Every manual refactor and repetitive boilerplate task is a friction point eroding your margins and killing your flow state. The difference between a struggling freelancer and a high-earner isn't raw coding speed—it's the ability to offload cognitive load to intelligent, context-aware agents.

Today, we pivot. We are moving beyond standard IDE usage into an automated paradigm where Claude Code acts as your senior-level partner. By combining Antigravity’s architectural scaffolding with Claude’s reasoning capabilities, you’ll reclaim your time and turn your development process into a high-speed assembly line.

steps.title: Initialize Context-Aware Environment
steps.description: Establish a robust project baseline that ensures Claude Code understands your architectural patterns before you write a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze current project architecture and generate a comprehensive context file for Claude Code, focusing on existing design patterns and naming conventions.

steps.title: Define Custom Skill Setups
steps.description: Create specialized skill files that allow Claude to handle repetitive tasks like unit testing or API documentation generation without manual prompting.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a standardized 'Feature-Generator' skill definition that includes test-driven development requirements and JSDoc standards.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Injection
steps.description: Use Antigravity to feed structured templates into Claude, ensuring every new feature follows your agency’s gold standard.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a library of clean-code boilerplate components that align with our current React/Node stack for rapid injection.

steps.title: Implement Intelligent Refactoring Loops
steps.description: Set up a continuous feedback loop where Claude automatically identifies technical debt and suggests refactors during the commit process.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure an automated linting and refactoring agent that scans for performance bottlenecks in the current codebase.

steps.title: Validate with Autonomous Testing
steps.description: Ensure your velocity doesn't compromise quality by forcing Claude to write and execute tests against every generated feature.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a testing suite that triggers automatically after any code generation task to verify feature integrity.

pro_tips: Always use a .claudeignore file to prevent the agent from indexing massive node_modules or bloated build artifacts, which preserves context window efficiency.
Map your most frequent shell aliases to Claude Code custom commands to shave seconds off every interaction.
Use 'Explain' mode on complex legacy codebases before attempting refactors to ensure the AI understands the business logic side-effects.
Chain your prompts by using the 'history' feature to maintain continuity across long, multi-day development sprints.
Configure local environment variables securely using vault-based secrets; never hardcode credentials that Claude might accidentally read.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, conduct a 30-minute 'stress test' on a small feature to calibrate your skill definitions, then iterate based on the output quality.
content.conversion_block: Stop building the hard way and start scaling your freelance business with elite AI-assisted workflows. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
